aeo_readiness.summary: Aasen Heating & Cooling has a strong foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and structured data to maximize AI citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or installation tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and local service comparisons.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the local HVAC expert by creating in-depth content on energy efficiency and system maintenance.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and structured data.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQPage and HowTo schema, which are crucial for AI model citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Aasen Heating & Cooling.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—waiting means losing ground in the AI-driven landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Aasen Heating & Cooling
opening_line: After analyzing your website, we've identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and conversational queries.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven growth.
